name: Employer says chem exposure not work-related since off-site—wrong?

mainEntity.name: Employer says chem exposure not work-related since off-site—wrong?

acceptedAnswer.description: **If traveling for work or fumes followed you, it's compensable under 'arising out of' employment.** Utah covers occupational exposures broadly.[6] Key factors: job duties link, medical opinion. Off-site doesn't auto-exclude; prove nexus. Challenge via hearing.
